fields.helpText: The value of this field identifies the template that is defined in this entry.

DIMSE stands for DICOM Message Service Element.   The value of this field is a command that is recognized in a DICOM communication stream. The template described in this entry describes the list of data fields that are exchanged for this command.
SOP stands for Service-Object pair.   The value of this field is the name of the SOP-class on which the DIMSE command in this entry will operate.
The value of this field is a text that identifies the kind of event for the SOP-class on which this template operates.
The value of this field is a code that identifies the kind of event for the SOP-class on which this template operates.
